text.title: Business Storytelling Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "artefact_type": "exec-summary", "framework": "pyramid", "audience": "Series-A board, 5-min read", "central_claim": "We should retire product line B in Q3 and redirect engineering to line A growth.", "body": { "lead": "Retire product line B in Q3.", "support_1": "Line B revenue is 8% of total and declining 15% QoQ.", "support_2": "Engineering hours on B (40%) cap A's growth velocity at half capacity.", "support_3": "Customer overlap is 70% \u2014 line B churn risk to A is contained.", "so_what_1": "8% declining means line B is not the future cash engine.", "so_what_2": "Reclaiming 40% of engineering doubles A's velocity for the high-growth quarter.", "so_what_3": "Low standalone B-only retention means retirement risk is bounded." } }

example.note: artefact_type outside enum; missing framework, audience, body.

list.item: Mixing two frameworks in the body (e.g. pyramid + pixar).
central_claim > 200 chars — central claims must fit on one breath.
Body lacking so_what_N counterpart for support_N (Pyramid).
